title: CBB Volume 5 Ancillary Service Providers Authorisation Module AU-1.2 Definition of Regulated Ancillary Services
summary: Establishes the regulated perimeter for digital financial ancillary services under CBB Volume 5.

theme_notes.digital_finance.payments_emoney: Defines regulated ancillary services including payment services, AISP, PISP, card processing and crowdfunding.

notes: Related instruments: CBB Rulebook and CBB consultations
